query: graph neural networks for molecular property prediction

source_papers.title: Graph Neural Networks for Molecular Property Prediction
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: message passing, graph attention, descriptor baselines. The paper explains that atoms and bonds are encoded as graphs, graph attention improves molecular representations, and descriptor baselines remain a comparison point.

gold_topic: Graph neural networks for molecular property prediction

query: retrieval augmented generation for literature review assistants

source_papers.title: Retrieval Augmented Generation for Literature Review Assistants
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: retrieval augmented generation, source grounding, citation verification. The paper argues that literature assistants should retrieve evidence before generation and verify citations against retrieved metadata.

gold_topic: Retrieval augmented generation for literature review assistants

query: clinical note classification with transformer encoders

source_papers.title: Clinical Note Classification with Transformer Encoders
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: transformer encoders, clinical notes, de-identification. The study classifies clinical notes after de-identification and compares transformer encoders with bag-of-words baselines.

gold_topic: Clinical note classification with transformer encoders

query: contrastive learning for medical image representation

source_papers.title: Contrastive Learning for Medical Image Representation
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: contrastive learning, image augmentations, linear probe. The paper trains representations with contrastive learning, applies domain-specific image augmentations, and evaluates transfer quality with a linear probe.

gold_topic: Contrastive learning for medical image representation

query: diffusion models for controllable image synthesis

source_papers.title: Diffusion Models for Controllable Image Synthesis
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: diffusion models, denoising score matching, classifier-free guidance. The method uses diffusion models trained with denoising score matching and controls generation through classifier-free guidance.

gold_topic: Diffusion models for controllable image synthesis

query: federated learning under client drift

source_papers.title: Federated Learning under Client Drift
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: federated learning, client drift, secure aggregation. The paper studies federated learning when non-IID clients create client drift and uses secure aggregation to protect local updates.

gold_topic: Federated learning under client drift

query: time series forecasting with temporal fusion transformers

source_papers.title: Time Series Forecasting with Temporal Fusion Transformers
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: time series forecasting, temporal fusion transformer, quantile loss. The paper applies a temporal fusion transformer to multihorizon time series forecasting and optimizes probabilistic predictions with quantile loss.

gold_topic: Time series forecasting with temporal fusion transformers

query: knowledge distillation for compact language models

source_papers.title: Knowledge Distillation for Compact Language Models
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: knowledge distillation, teacher model, temperature scaling. The work compresses a teacher model into a smaller student and uses temperature scaling to soften training targets.

gold_topic: Knowledge distillation for compact language models

query: off-policy evaluation in reinforcement learning

source_papers.title: Off-Policy Evaluation in Reinforcement Learning
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: reinforcement learning, off-policy evaluation, inverse propensity scoring. The paper evaluates policies in reinforcement learning without new interaction data and uses inverse propensity scoring for logged trajectories.

gold_topic: Off-policy evaluation in reinforcement learning

query: causal inference for policy impact studies

source_papers.title: Causal Inference for Policy Impact Studies
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: causal inference, propensity score matching, difference-in-differences. The study estimates policy impacts with causal inference, balances groups with propensity score matching, and validates temporal effects using difference-in-differences.

gold_topic: Causal inference for policy impact studies

query: anomaly detection in industrial sensor streams

source_papers.title: Anomaly Detection in Industrial Sensor Streams
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: anomaly detection, autoencoder reconstruction error, isolation forest. The paper monitors industrial sensor streams, scores anomalies by autoencoder reconstruction error, and compares results with an isolation forest.

gold_topic: Anomaly detection in industrial sensor streams

query: recommender systems with implicit feedback

source_papers.title: Recommender Systems with Implicit Feedback
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: recommender systems, matrix factorization, implicit feedback. The paper models recommender systems from clicks and views, applies matrix factorization, and treats implicit feedback as noisy preference evidence.

gold_topic: Recommender systems with implicit feedback

query: self-supervised speech recognition with wav2vec

source_papers.title: Self-Supervised Speech Recognition with wav2vec
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: speech recognition, wav2vec, connectionist temporal classification. The system pretrains wav2vec representations for speech recognition and fine-tunes them with connectionist temporal classification.

gold_topic: Self-supervised speech recognition with wav2vec

query: biomedical named entity recognition with sequence models

source_papers.title: Biomedical Named Entity Recognition with Sequence Models
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: named entity recognition, CRF decoding, biomedical abstracts. The paper performs named entity recognition on biomedical abstracts and adds CRF decoding on top of contextual token encoders.

gold_topic: Biomedical named entity recognition with sequence models

query: code summarization using neural program representations

source_papers.title: Code Summarization using Neural Program Representations
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: code summarization, abstract syntax tree, transformer decoder. The approach builds program representations from an abstract syntax tree and generates code summarization outputs with a transformer decoder.

gold_topic: Code summarization using neural program representations

query: question answering over long scientific documents

source_papers.title: Question Answering over Long Scientific Documents
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: question answering, supporting evidence, long document context. The paper studies question answering over long document context and requires systems to return supporting evidence with each answer.

gold_topic: Question answering over long scientific documents

query: graph clustering for community detection

source_papers.title: Graph Clustering for Community Detection
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: graph clustering, modularity optimization, community detection. The paper formulates community detection as graph clustering and optimizes modularity to identify dense node groups.

gold_topic: Graph clustering for community detection

query: active learning for low-resource annotation

source_papers.title: Active Learning for Low-Resource Annotation
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: active learning, uncertainty sampling, annotation cost. The study uses active learning to select examples, applies uncertainty sampling, and measures reduction in annotation cost.

gold_topic: Active learning for low-resource annotation

query: privacy preserving machine learning with differential privacy

source_papers.title: Privacy Preserving Machine Learning with Differential Privacy
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: privacy preserving machine learning, differential privacy, epsilon budget. The paper trains privacy preserving machine learning models with differential privacy and reports an epsilon budget for each experiment.

gold_topic: Privacy preserving machine learning with differential privacy

query: table extraction from scientific papers

source_papers.title: Table Extraction from Scientific Papers
source_papers.abstract: This benchmark abstract states required facts for extraction: table extraction, layout parsing, cell coordinates. The method performs table extraction from scientific papers, relies on layout parsing, and preserves cell coordinates for downstream validation.

gold_topic: Table extraction from scientific papers
